title: Oru Punnagai thane Lyrics Theeratha Vilayattu Pillai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Oru punnagai thaane veesi sendraai
oru punnagai thaane veesi sendraai

adhu nadanthu nadanthu nadanthu
nadai paathai muzhukka kadanthu
adhu alainthu alainthu alainthu
sila dhoora ellai thirinthu

adhu ennai sernthadhu thamathamaaga
un kadhal vanthadhu sammadhamaaga

eppadi en manam ippadi aanadho
appadi ennathaan unnidam ulladho

oru punnagai thaane veesi sendraai
oru punnagai thaane veesi sendraai

sila iravugal baaramaanadhey
eeramanadhey kaaramanadhey
sila pagalgalum kolludhey
unai solludhey enai sorpamaakkudhey

idhu enna maayamanadho
kaayamanodhum nyayamaanadhey
hey penney nee enna
azhagaana koore vaala
kollamal kolkindrai
udaikindren thool thoola

en idayam eeram sottave
undhan paadhayil eduthu vaikkiren
un paathangal theendumo
illai thaandumo edhir paarthu nirkindren
ulagathil unnai paadave
unnai polavore uvamai illaye
anbey un perai thaan oppithu nindreney
kan pattum saagamal thapithu vandheney

adhu nadanthu nadanthu nadanthu
nadai paathai muzhukka kadanthu
adhu alainthu alainthu alainthu
sila dhoora ellai thirinthu
adhu ennai sernthadhu thamathamaaga
un kadhal vanthadhu sammadhamaaga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Punnagai Thane expresses the emotions of love and the joy it brings, reflecting on the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Theeratha Vilayattu Pillai, the song plays during a pivotal romantic scene, highlighting the protagonist's feelings for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ranjith and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was the song released?

Oru Punnagai Thane was released on December 29, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Punnagai Thane, the protagonist expresses his deep affection and the transformative power of love. The song beautifully captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a standout piece in Theeratha Vilayattu Pillai. With heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay and a melodious composition by Yuvan, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This enchanting melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the joy of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Punnagai Thane from Theeratha Vilayattu Pillai is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Ranjith's soulful voice, combined with Yuvan's enchanting composition, creates a captivating atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes, making it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: You are like a smile that has come to me, you are like a smile that has come to me.
It moves, moves, moves along the path, it goes through everything, it wanders and wanders, it turns around some distant corners.
What has come to me is your love, it has come to me naturally.
How did my heart become like this? That's how it is with you.
You are like a smile that has come to me, you are like a smile that has come to me.
Some nights are like a dream, some days are like a reality, they tell about you, they make me feel lost.
What kind of magic is this? It is also justice, hey girl, why are you so beautiful? I am overwhelmed and lost.
I take your love and place it in my heart, I wonder if your paths will meet or not, I stand here looking at the world, there is no one like you, my love, I have come here without losing my way.
You have made a single braid.
It moves, moves, moves along the path, it goes through everything, it wanders and wanders, it turns around some distant corners, what has come to me is your love, it has come to me naturally.
